name: Vegan: Barley & Mushroom Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large pot over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped onion and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the sliced mushrooms and garlic; stir and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
4. Pour in the white wine and dried thyme; sauté another 3 minutes.
5. Stir in the barley and soy flakes (if using); cook for another 3 minutes.
6. Add the broth, return to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for about 40 minutes or until the barley is tender.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Stir in the dried dill and dry sherry; cook for an additional minute.
9. Serve hot.
